name: Hednesford
description:
Local officers cover the following areas: Pye Green, West Hill, Broadhurst Green,Green Heath, Station Road and Brindley, Hednesford Hills, Littleworth, Hill Top, Blake, Marquis and Beaudesert.

Home to Hednesford Hills and Cannock Chase - including the visitors' centre at Marquis Drive - this district boasts some of the nation's most outstanding areas of natural beauty. Hednesford is a town in its own right and is currently undergoing extensive regeneration and redevelopment. Hednesford Raceway, regarded as one of Europe's premier stock car racing circuits, is one of the main attractions, along with the Museum of Cannock Chase which includes the mining history of this area.
